aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite or recommend this business due to critical gaps in structured data, content, and visibility on platforms like Google Business Profile.
quick_wins: Renew the domain immediately to restore website functionality.
Implement basic schema markup (LocalBusiness, FAQPage) to improve AI visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business is completely invisible on Google Business Profile, severely limiting local search presence and AI-driven recommendations.
critical_issues: No GBP content (photos, posts, Q&A) to engage users or AI.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on expanding NAP citations to additional relevant directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and content prevents AI from understanding and recommending the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries where AI assistants seek detailed, structured information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with essential business details.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating and marking up detailed FAQ content to establish expertise and improve AI citations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by fixing your invisible online presence.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI visibility, the business is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website is currently invisible on Google Business Profile and lacks essential schema markup.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will renew your domain, implement critical schema, optimize GBP, and create conversational content to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first three months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimized for AI search.

email_subject_line: Fix your AI visibility gap and capture more HVAC leads now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found critical issues that are causing your business to be invisible to AI models.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
